title: Principal Plant Manager at Mapei India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Mapei India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Mapei India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Amritsar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Mapei India South Asia Partners:
Mapei India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mapei India South Asia Partners!
